Brand.name: UNIREAL
Brand.tagline: Real reviews and answers about universities worldwide

Home.heroTitle: Find the right university — with real student voices
Home.heroSubtitle: Explore thousands of universities worldwide. Read honest reviews, ask questions, and get verified answers.
Home.feature1Body: Thousands of universities across 200+ countries, with names in your language.
Home.feature2Body: Reviews and answers from people verified through their university email domain.
Home.feature3Body: Ratings, tuition data and outcomes — transparent and free to browse.
